steps.title: Convert seconds to minutes
steps.content:
Because the unit is per second squared, multiply by $60^2$ to convert to per minute squared:
$$1.3\cdot (1/1{,}609)\cdot 60^2=2.9$$

steps.title: Round to the nearest tenth
steps.content: The converted rate is about $2.9$ miles per minute squared. The answer is B.
